training_status: highly active/athletic, backcountry skiing, gym lifting

benefits.description: Using Reta to trim stubborn love handles

side_effects.description: Decreased cardio performance; heart rate higher than usual (145 vs 135 bpm on steady uphill), perceived exertion increased

protocol_notes: OP is considering adding IGF-1 LR3 to maintain or add muscle while losing weight on Reta. Concerned about blood sugar/insulin resistance interactions. Lifts not significantly affected but cardio markedly worse.
